entries.content: The Old Oak Tavern is a bustling inn run by a grumpy dwarf named Gorbag. It smells of stale ale and roasted pork.
Gorbag is the 150-year-old dwarf proprietor of the Old Oak Tavern. He has a braided iron-grey beard and hates elves.
Elves in this world are known for their graceful archery and deep connection to the ancient forests of Silvanus.
